message:
test(proptest): expand diagnostic (15→28) and ewma (16→26) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

diagnostic: options clone/Debug/type name, boundary output paths, default limit
ordering, result clone serialize identity, JSON field count, pretty/compact, value
preservation.
ewma: new uninit, double-reset idempotent, stats serde roundtrip, constant zero
variance, mean tracks ewma, variance count, single tick, monotone convergence,
stddev sqrt variance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
